insurance_providers.name: LegacyCare Basic

treatment_packages.description: Enhanced 5-session shoulder performance program with extended visit times and up to three telehealth check-ins.

treatment_packages.name: 5-Session Shoulder Clinic Rehab
treatment_packages.description: In-clinic only 5-visit shoulder rehab plan ideal for non-surgical rotator cuff pain.

treatment_packages.name: 8-Session Return to Throwing (Shoulder & Elbow)
treatment_packages.description: Progressive 8-session program for baseball and softball players returning to throwing after injury.

treatment_packages.name: 5-Session ACL Rehab Starter Pack
treatment_packages.description: Initial 5-session package for early to mid-stage ACL rehabilitation, ideal for post-op weeks 4–10.

treatment_packages.name: 10-Session Comprehensive ACL Program
treatment_packages.description: Comprehensive ACL program combining strength, neuromuscular control, and return-to-sport testing.

treatment_packages.name: 4-Session Ankle Sprain Express Rehab
treatment_packages.description: Targeted 4-session plan for grade I–II ankle sprains to restore stability and confidence.

treatment_packages.name: 6-Session Plantar Fasciitis for Runners
treatment_packages.description: Run-focused 6-visit program addressing plantar fasciitis with gait analysis and load management.

treatment_packages.name: 10-Session Total Return to Sport Program
treatment_packages.description: Full-body, multi-region return-to-sport plan tailored to complex or multi-site injuries.

treatment_packages.name: Single-Visit Injury Screen
treatment_packages.description: One-time 40-minute injury screen for new aches and pains with home program recommendations.

treatment_packages.name: Telehealth Post-Op Rehab Monthly Subscription
treatment_packages.description: Unlimited messaging plus up to four 30-minute telehealth sessions per month for post-op rehab support.

treatment_packages.name: Return to Sport Soccer - Intermediate (6 Classes)
treatment_packages.description: Small-group intermediate return-to-soccer class pack focusing on change of direction, deceleration, and ball control.

treatment_packages.name: Return to Sport Soccer - Advanced (8 Classes)
treatment_packages.description: High-intensity field-based sessions for late-stage return to competitive soccer.

treatment_packages.name: 3-Session Shoulder Telehealth Follow-Up
treatment_packages.description: Three telehealth follow-up visits for patients already evaluated in-clinic for shoulder issues.

treatment_packages.name: 5-Session Ankle & Foot Return to Running
treatment_packages.description: Return-to-running program for ankle and foot injuries with treadmill gait analysis.

treatment_packages.name: 5-Session Shoulder Hybrid Rehab (Budget)
treatment_packages.description: Cost-conscious 5-session shoulder plan mixing in-clinic and telehealth check-ins to reduce total cost.

treatment_packages.name: Legacy 5-Session Shoulder Package (Discontinued)
treatment_packages.description: Older pricing structure for shoulder rehab; no longer sold to new patients.

therapist_reviews.title: Back to running after plantar fasciitis
therapist_reviews.comment: Alex explained exactly how to progress my mileage and adjust my shoes. Plantar fasciitis pain was 90% better in 4 weeks.

therapist_reviews.title: Runner-focused and very thorough
therapist_reviews.comment: Loved the gait analysis and strength plan. Alex really understands distance runners.

therapist_reviews.title: Great plantar fasciitis specialist
therapist_reviews.comment: A bit of a wait for an evening slot, but the treatment plan for my plantar fasciitis was spot on.

therapist_reviews.title: Fixed chronic heel pain
therapist_reviews.comment: After months of heel pain from soccer, Alex got me back to full games with no issues.

therapist_reviews.title: Helpful home program for foot pain
therapist_reviews.comment: Home exercises were clearly explained and easy to follow. My morning foot pain is much better.

therapist_reviews.title: Soccer return-to-sport expert
therapist_reviews.comment: Came in for plantar fasciitis from weekend soccer. The return-to-play plan felt very safe and individualized.

therapist_reviews.title: Detailed running form analysis
therapist_reviews.comment: Alex broke down my stride on video and gave drills that immediately felt better on my arches.

therapist_reviews.title: Good communication and follow-up
therapist_reviews.comment: App reminders and check-ins helped me stay consistent with the plantar fasciitis rehab.

therapist_reviews.title: Got me to my half marathon
therapist_reviews.comment: Was worried about my foot holding up. Alex adjusted my plan so I could still run my race pain-free.

therapist_reviews.title: Highly recommend for runners
therapist_reviews.comment: If you run and have foot/ankle issues, Alex is the person you want to see.

therapist_reviews.title: Professional and motivating
therapist_reviews.comment: Sessions were efficient, and Alex always made sure I understood the plan and goals.

therapist_reviews.title: Excellent ACL follow-up care
therapist_reviews.comment: Dr. Lee is very clear about progressions and checked my form on every exercise.

therapist_reviews.title: Great downtown clinic experience
therapist_reviews.comment: Friendly staff and efficient sessions. Parking can be tricky but Dr. Lee is worth it.

therapist_reviews.title: Knee feels stable again
therapist_reviews.comment: I saw Dr. Lee for post-op knee rehab. Learned how to safely get back to recreational basketball.

therapist_reviews.title: Thoughtful and precise
therapist_reviews.comment: Dr. Lee took time to answer all my ACL questions and gave clear goals between visits.

therapist_reviews.title: Helped my plantar fasciitis quickly
therapist_reviews.comment: Taylor gave a simple routine I could do between runs. Pain improved within two weeks.

therapist_reviews.title: Good for recreational runners
therapist_reviews.comment: Clear instructions and practical advice on shoe changes and stretching.

therapist_reviews.title: Great telehealth post-op support
therapist_reviews.comment: Maria made virtual knee check-ins feel just as effective as in person and adjusted my home program each week.

therapist_reviews.title: Convenient evening telehealth sessions
therapist_reviews.comment: I scheduled all my post-op rehab after work via telehealth with Maria. Very convenient and effective.

therapist_reviews.title: Solid ankle sprain rehab
therapist_reviews.comment: Samir got me walking without a limp in a couple of weeks and back to rec league soccer soon after.

therapists.bio: Alex specializes in foot and ankle rehab for runners, with a focus on plantar fasciitis, Achilles issues, and return-to-running programs. He integrates video gait analysis and strength testing to build progressive training plans that fit around race schedules.

Dr. Lee is a board-certified sports physical therapist focused on ACL rehabilitation and lower-extremity return-to-sport testing. He uses objective strength and hop testing to safely guide athletes back to cutting and pivoting sports.
Taylor works with soccer players and runners dealing with knee and foot pain, including early return-to-sport after minor injuries. She frequently coaches small-group return-to-soccer classes.

Maria provides telehealth-focused post-operative rehab for knee, shoulder, and spine surgeries. Her sessions emphasize clear home programming, pain management, and safe progression between in-person surgeon visits.
Samir focuses on acute ankle and foot injuries, particularly for field and court sport athletes. He prioritizes early weight-bearing, balance, and field-specific drills to speed return to play.
Priya specializes in shoulder and knee post-operative rehab, combining in-clinic strength work with telehealth check-ins to keep patients on track between visits.
David focuses on spine and hip conditions, integrating strength and conditioning principles for long-term durability. He offers both in-person and telehealth sessions.
Emily works with runners and triathletes dealing with knee pain, IT band syndrome, and post-ACL return-to-running phases.
Lucas leads shoulder and upper-extremity programs, including small-group return-to-throwing classes for overhead athletes.
Olivia focuses on adolescent and recreational athletes with a variety of sports injuries, emphasizing education and long-term injury prevention.

Telehealth follow-up support between in-person post-op visits.

Pre-work follow-up slot for existing ACL patients.
60-minute plantar fasciitis assessment for runners, includes gait analysis.
Saturday late-morning plantar fasciitis assessment for runners and soccer players.
Telehealth-certified post-op rehab session (knee focus); ideal for evening follow-ups.

Telehealth ACL/post-op knee session with Dr. Lee.

Later evening shoulder follow-up option with the same therapist and location.

appointments.notesToTherapist: Felt slight instability during cutting drills last week.

appointments.notesToTherapist: Pain worst first thing in the morning and after long work shifts.

class_programs.name: Return to Sport: Soccer (Intermediate) - Weeknight Series
class_programs.description: 6-week small-group intermediate return-to-soccer program focusing on change of direction, deceleration, and controlled contact drills for athletes cleared for light scrimmage.

class_programs.name: Return to Sport: Soccer (Advanced) - Weekend Field Session
class_programs.description: Field-based advanced return-to-soccer program with live scrimmage, reactive agility, and conditioning for athletes nearing full clearance.

class_programs.name: Runner Strength & Stability Group
class_programs.description: 4-week strength and stability series for runners targeting hips, core, and lower leg to reduce risk of overuse injuries.

class_programs.name: Post-Op Shoulder Rehab Group
class_programs.description: Beginner-level small-group shoulder rehab for patients 6–16 weeks after rotator cuff or labral repair, focusing on strength and motor control.

class_programs.name: Return to Sport: Soccer (Beginner)
class_programs.description: Entry-level return-to-soccer class for athletes just cleared to jog and perform basic ball work after lower-extremity injury.

class_programs.name: Return to Sport: Basketball (Intermediate)
class_programs.description: Intermediate-level on-court return-to-basketball program emphasizing landing mechanics, cutting, and change-of-direction after knee injury.

class_programs.name: Youth Multi-Sport Injury Prevention
class_programs.description: Movement fundamentals, balance, and strength for youth athletes across soccer, basketball, and general field sports.

class_programs.name: Full-Body Mobility Lab (Virtual)
class_programs.description: Live telehealth mobility class targeting spine, hips, and shoulders for active adults wanting to move better and recover faster.

class_programs.name: Post-Op Knee Group Coaching (Virtual)
class_programs.description: Telehealth group check-in for post-operative knee patients covering exercise progressions, swelling management, and Q&A.

class_programs.name: Total Athlete Strength & Conditioning
class_programs.description: Gym-based strength and power class for recreational athletes focusing on lower-body strength, trunk control, and power development.
